message:
Add sync workflow e2e tests

Tests cover:
- Fresh remote sync initialization
- Pull changes from remote
- Dry-run mode verification
- Status check reporting
- Remote management (add/list/remove)
- Push-only and pull-only modes

Uses filesystem remotes for network-independent testing.

Note: E2E suite has pre-existing compilation issue (unsafe blocks
in rich_output_helpers.rs) that needs separate resolution.

Closes: meta_skill-nd11

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
